Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests

Class AbstractProofTreeTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests.AbstractProofTreeTests
All Implemented Interfaces:
IProofTreeChangedListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProofDependenciesTests, ProofTreeDeltaTests, ProofTreeTests, RebuildTests, TypeTests
public abstract class AbstractProofTreeTests extends Object implements IProofTreeChangedListener
Common implementation for tests related to proof trees.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AbstractProofTreeTests()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    applyRule(IProofTreeNode node, IProofRule rule)
    Applies the given rule to the given node, expecting success.
    void
    assertAncestor(IProofTreeNode ancestor, IProofTreeNode node)
    Checks that the first given node is an ancestor of the second one.
    void
    assertDeltas(String expected)
    Checks that the specified delta has been produced since the last call to startDeltas() or flushDeltas(), whichever happened last.
    final void
    assertEmpty(Object[] array)
    Checks that the given array is empty.
    void
    assertNodeClosed(IProofTreeNode node)
    Checks that the given node is closed, using all available methods.
    void
    assertNodeDischarged(IProofTreeNode node)
    Checks that the given node is discharged, using all available methods.
    void
    assertNodeOpen(IProofTreeNode node)
    Checks that the given node is open, using all available methods.
    void
    assertNodePending(IProofTreeNode node)
    Checks that the given node is pending, using all available methods.
    void
    assertNodeReviewed(IProofTreeNode node)
    Checks that the given node is reviewed, using all available methods.
    final void
    assertNotEmpty(Object[] array)
    Checks that the given array is not empty.
    final void
    assertSingleton(Object expectedElement, Object[] array)
    Checks that the given array contains one and only one expected element.
    void
    assertTreeDischarged(IProofTree tree)
    Checks that the given tree is discharged, using all available methods.
    void
    checkOpenDescendants(IProofTreeNode node)
    Checks that the information about open descendants of a given node is consistent: the nodes returned are actually descendants and are open.
    void
    checkTree(IProofTree tree, IProofTreeNode root, IProverSequent sequent)
    Checks consistency of information on a proof tree and its root.
    void
    flushDeltas()
    Flushes the delta recorded.
    static IProverSequent
    makeSimpleSequent(String goal)
    Returns a new prover sequent with no hypothesis and the given goal.
    void
    proofTreeChanged(IProofTreeDelta delta)
    Records a new delta notified by a proof tree.
    void
    startDeltas(IProofTree tree)
    Starts recording delta for the given proof tree.
    void
    stopDeltas(IProofTree tree)
    Stops recording delta for the given proof tree.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractProofTreeTests

      public AbstractProofTreeTests()

  • Method Details

    • applyRule

      public void applyRule(IProofTreeNode node, IProofRule rule)
      Applies the given rule to the given node, expecting success.
      Parameters:
      node - a proof tree node
      rule - the rule to apply

    • assertAncestor

      public void assertAncestor(IProofTreeNode ancestor, IProofTreeNode node)
      Checks that the first given node is an ancestor of the second one.
      Parameters:
      expectedAncestor - the expected ancestor
      node - the node to test

    • assertDeltas

      public void assertDeltas(String expected)
      Checks that the specified delta has been produced since the last call to startDeltas() or flushDeltas(), whichever happened last.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected delta

    • assertEmpty

      public final void assertEmpty(Object[] array)
      Checks that the given array is empty.
      Parameters:
      array - the array to test for emptyness

    • assertNodeClosed

      public void assertNodeClosed(IProofTreeNode node)
      Checks that the given node is closed, using all available methods.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to test

    • assertNodeReviewed

      public void assertNodeReviewed(IProofTreeNode node)
      Checks that the given node is reviewed, using all available methods.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to test

    • assertNodeDischarged

      public void assertNodeDischarged(IProofTreeNode node)
      Checks that the given node is discharged, using all available methods.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to test

    • assertTreeDischarged

      public void assertTreeDischarged(IProofTree tree)
      Checks that the given tree is discharged, using all available methods.
      Parameters:
      tree - the proof tree to test

    • assertNodeOpen

      public void assertNodeOpen(IProofTreeNode node)
      Checks that the given node is open, using all available methods.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to test

    • assertNodePending

      public void assertNodePending(IProofTreeNode node)
      Checks that the given node is pending, using all available methods.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to test

    • assertNotEmpty

      public final void assertNotEmpty(Object[] array)
      Checks that the given array is not empty.
      Parameters:
      array - the array to test for emptyness

    • assertSingleton

      public final void assertSingleton(Object expectedElement, Object[] array)
      Checks that the given array contains one and only one expected element.
      Parameters:
      expectedElement - the expected element of the given array
      array - the array to test for emptyness

    • checkOpenDescendants

      public void checkOpenDescendants(IProofTreeNode node)
      Checks that the information about open descendants of a given node is consistent: the nodes returned are actually descendants and are open.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to test

    • checkTree

      public void checkTree(IProofTree tree, IProofTreeNode root, IProverSequent sequent)
      Checks consistency of information on a proof tree and its root.
      Parameters:
      tree - the proof tree to test
      root - the expected root of the given tree
      sequent - the expected sequent of the proof tree

    • flushDeltas

      public void flushDeltas()
      Flushes the delta recorded. After this call, there is no delta pending, waiting for asserting them.

    • makeSimpleSequent

      public static IProverSequent makeSimpleSequent(String goal)
      Returns a new prover sequent with no hypothesis and the given goal.
      Parameters:
      goal - goal of the sequent
      Returns:
      a new sequent with the given goal

    • proofTreeChanged

      public void proofTreeChanged(IProofTreeDelta delta)
      Records a new delta notified by a proof tree. Not to be called by test cases.
      Specified by:
      proofTreeChanged in interface IProofTreeChangedListener
      Parameters:
      delta - description of the change to the observed proof tree

    • startDeltas

      public void startDeltas(IProofTree tree)
      Starts recording delta for the given proof tree.
      Parameters:
      tree - the proof tree for which deltas should get recorded

    • stopDeltas

      public void stopDeltas(IProofTree tree)
      Stops recording delta for the given proof tree.
      Parameters:
      tree - the proof tree for which deltas should not be recorded
